entries.statement: Assign Marcus to the hospital project with an explicit multifamily handoff plan. Promote Carlos to assistant superintendent on the school project only with Safety/Training sign-off. Activate an HR backstop hire for superintendent coverage. Delay warehouse work or subcontract concrete scope if float cannot be protected.

basis.intent: Staff highest-risk projects with qualified field leadership
supporting_evidence: Hospital client is asking for a named senior superintendent with healthcare experience
Multifamily closeout is slipping and keeping Marcus longer than planned
HR has two superintendent candidates but neither can start next week
assumptions_relied_on: The hospital project carries the highest delivery and client risk
Promotion candidate Carlos can succeed with support and training
HR candidates cannot start immediately enough for the hospital date
risks_addressed: Overloading senior superintendents such as Marcus
Client escalation on hospital or school projects
risks_accepted: Schedule penalties if experienced field leadership is pulled
Weak supervision on lower-priority projects during reallocation
constraints_respected: Hospital project start is approaching with a client call requiring a named superintendent
School schedule has minimal float on key milestones
tradeoffs: Hospital client urgency versus school penalty exposure if leadership is moved
Promoting Carlos quickly versus safety/training readiness
alternatives_considered: Hire a traveling superintendent or contract superintendent for the hospital start
Split superintendent coverage across hospital and school critical paths temporarily
missing_context_caveats: Confirmed hospital and school start dates and owner commitments
Certification and training status for promotion and hospital requirements

would_change_if: If the hospital owner confirms a start date that no longer requires an immediate named superintendent.
If Safety/Training does not sign off on Carlos's readiness before the school project needs coverage.

entries.statement: Finalize a Q4 staffing matrix before the monthly staffing review

basis.intent: Make promotion and hiring decisions explicit before client-facing commitments
supporting_evidence: HR has two superintendent candidates but neither can start next week
constraints_respected: Decision is needed before the monthly staffing review and Thursday client call
missing_context_caveats: Candidate availability and hiring timeline from HR

would_change_if: If HR provides updated candidate availability before the staffing review.

entries.statement: Confirm schedule float with project controls on school and hospital work

basis.intent: Avoid schedule penalties on the school and hospital work
supporting_evidence: School project controls reports minimal float on structural milestones
assumptions_relied_on: Core project dates are not fully movable
constraints_respected: School schedule has minimal float on key milestones
missing_context_caveats: Real schedule float on each affected project

would_change_if: If project controls confirms more float than currently assumed on the school milestones.

entries.statement: Decide promotion and foreman backfill plan for Carlos with named owners

basis.intent: Make promotion and hiring decisions explicit before client-facing commitments
assumptions_relied_on: Promotion candidate Carlos can succeed with support and training
risks_addressed: Safety and compliance gaps if promotion happens before training is complete
alternatives_considered: Promote foreman Carlos to assistant superintendent on the school project with a defined training plan

would_change_if: If Carlos declines the promotion or is not ready before the school project needs coverage.

entries.statement: Validate safety and training readiness before any promotion or reassignment

basis.intent: Protect safety and quality across active jobs
supporting_evidence: Safety/training requirements for Carlos promotion are not yet resolved
risks_addressed: Safety and compliance gaps if promotion happens before training is complete
missing_context_caveats: Certification and training status for promotion and hospital requirements

would_change_if: If Safety/Training confirms Carlos meets readiness requirements ahead of schedule.

entries.statement: Assign HR owner for traveling or contract superintendent hiring path

basis.intent: Staff highest-risk projects with qualified field leadership
constraints_respected: HR candidates cannot start immediately and onboarding is slow
alternatives_considered: Hire a traveling superintendent or contract superintendent for the hospital start
missing_context_caveats: Candidate availability and hiring timeline from HR

would_change_if: If a traveling superintendent candidate is not identified before the hospital start date.

entries.statement: Revisit allocation decisions at the next workforce planning meeting

basis.intent: Avoid burnout and attrition among senior field leaders
risks_accepted: Attrition from travel fatigue and repeated reassignments
tradeoffs: Protecting senior leaders from burnout versus covering every active job strongly
missing_context_caveats: Client tolerance for superintendent coverage changes

would_change_if: If the client signals rejection of the current superintendent coverage plan before the next meeting.
